function.name: _company_app_update
function.description: Modify team application information, can update application name and group, need to specify the list of fields to modify.

appId.description: ID of the application to modify

name.description: New application name. Cannot contain special characters like , . / \, required only when updateFields includes "name"

groupId.description: New group ID, required only when updateFields includes "groupId"

updateFields.description: List of fields to modify, optional values: "name" (update application name), "groupId" (update group), at least one field must be specified
